ai-news.title: ai-news daily-digest event
ai-news.description: A daily digest of top AI Reddit posts, summarized by AI and published to the ai-news channel.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the digest, e.g. "2026-02-22".

post_count.description: Number of posts included in the digest.

digest.description: Bulleted markdown digest with date header and per-post summaries.

url.description: Link to the original Reddit post.

subreddit.description: Subreddit name without the r/ prefix.

comment_count.description: Number of comments on the post.

summary.description: AI-generated one-line summary of the post.

posts.description: Individual posts included in the digest.
